initiator_prompt: You are {user_role}.
IMPORTANT: Write ONLY a message to instruct {assistant_role}. Do NOT simulate responses.
Your message will be sent directly to {assistant_role}. Wait for their response.
{context}
DemandAnalysis.context:
【Current Phase】 DemandAnalysis

【Task】
Ask {assistant_role} to analyze user requirements and recommend product modality.

【Result Format】
When both parties agree on a modality, use <result> tags to wrap the conclusion.
Example: <result>Application</result>
Do NOT include <result> tags in your message until a conclusion is reached.

【Context】
User requirement: "{task}"

Product Modality Options:
- Image: line charts, bar charts, flow charts, etc.
- Document: .docx files
- PowerPoint: .pptx files
- Excel: .xlsx files
- PDF: .pdf files
- Website: .html files
- Application: Python games, software, tools
- Dashboard: real-time information panels
- Mind Map: ideas around a core concept

Coding.context:
【Current Phase】 Coding

【Task】
Ask {assistant_role} to implement the software according to requirements.

【Result Format】
When implementation is complete and verified, use <result> tags to wrap the conclusion.
Example: <result>Done</result>
Do NOT include <result> tags in your message until implementation is verified.

【Important】
Instruct {assistant_role} to use Write tool for code files and Bash tool for testing.

ArtIntegration.context:
【Current Phase】 ArtIntegration

【Task】
Integrate designed images into GUI code.

【Result Format】
When images are integrated, use <result> tags to wrap the conclusion.
Example: <result>Done</result>
Do NOT include <result> tags in your message until integration is verified.

【Image Specs】
256x256 pixels. Use self.* to avoid garbage collection:
self.image = ImageTk.PhotoImage(Image.open("./image.png").resize((50, 50)))

CodeReviewComment.context:
【Current Phase】 CodeReviewComment

【Task】
Review code and fix issues.

【Result Format】
When all issues are resolved, use <result> tags to wrap the conclusion.
Example: <result>Done</result>
Do NOT include <result> tags in your message until all issues are resolved.

【Review Standards】
1. All classes imported correctly
2. All methods implemented
3. Necessary comments present
4. No potential bugs
5. Conforms to requirements
6. Logic is sound
